landing.headline: Professional references and documents, verified.
landing.subline: Collect, verify, sign, and share professional references for work, immigration, visas, education, and clients.
landing.regionNote: Your data stays in the region you choose.

login.title: Sign in to Verifolio
login.sent: If this email has an account, a sign-in link is on its way. The link is valid for 15 minutes.

callback.invalidTitle: This sign-in link is invalid or has expired
callback.invalidBody: Sign-in links are single-use and expire after 15 minutes. Request a new one below.

contacts.title: Recommenders
contacts.subtitle: Contacts are stored with their consent — anyone can ask for removal.
contacts.name: Name
contacts.deleteBody: {name} will be removed permanently. Contacts referenced by a reference request cannot be deleted.

profile.title: Profile
profile.legalNameHint: Optional. Used to match your name on formal documents.
profile.welcomeHint: Tell us how to display your name on requests and documents. You can change this later in Profile.

requests.title: Requests
requests.empty: No requests yet. Create your first one — it usually takes 2–3 days to collect a confirmed reference.
requests.notFoundBody: This request does not exist or you do not have access to it.

builder.title: New reference request
builder.templateHint: The template asks the right questions for your goal.
builder.contextHint: Context helps the recommender write a relevant letter.
builder.purposePlaceholder: e.g. International hiring — role, company, period…
builder.purposeVisibility: Only the recommender sees this — it helps them write an appropriate letter.
builder.recommenderHint: Pick from your contacts or add a new one.
builder.attestationError: Could not load the attestation text. Please retry.

terminal.DECLINED: The recommender declined this request. Reminders have stopped and their data is scheduled for erasure.
terminal.EXPIRED: This request expired. The invitation link no longer works.
terminal.CANCELLED: You cancelled this request. The invitation link no longer works.

review.title: Response received — review it
review.hint: The recommender submitted their response. Accept it to generate and lock the document, or ask for a correction. The full letter becomes available in the locked document after acceptance.
review.correctionHint: The recommender will get a new secure link. Your note is sent in the email and is not stored.
review.generatingHint: Generating the PDF, calculating the hash, and locking the version. This usually takes less than a minute.
review.generatedHint: Verification signals are recorded. You can now share the document with a secure link.
review.loadError: Could not load the submitted response. Please retry.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Locked, verifiable versions of your references.
documents.empty: No documents yet. Accept a submitted reference to generate your first locked document.
documents.notFoundBody: This document does not exist or you do not have access to it.

share.title: Share document
share.subtitle: A third party will see the document, trust summary, and verification timeline — nothing else from your folio.
share.audienceNote: Every open is recorded. You can revoke the link at any time.
share.oneTimeNotice: You won't see this link again — copy it now.
share.none: No share links yet. The public verification page is reachable only through a link you create.
share.footer: Creating and revoking links is recorded in the audit log.

dashboard.emptyHint: Collect your first verified document — it usually takes 2–3 days.
dashboard.step1Hint: You'll need their verbal consent to send a request.
dashboard.step2Hint: Pick a template — it asks the right questions.
dashboard.step3Hint: After review, the version is locked and verifiable by link.

invitation.title: {requester} asks you for a professional reference
invitation.intro: Template: {template}. Responding takes about 10–15 minutes; you can save a draft and return.
invitation.invalidTitle: This invitation link is invalid or has expired
invitation.invalidBody: The link may have been used, revoked, or the request may have expired or been withdrawn. If you expected an active request, ask the requester to send a new invitation.
invitation.confirmHint: First, confirm you control {email} — we'll email a 6-digit code. Opening this link alone confirms nothing.
invitation.codeSent: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. It is valid for 10 minutes.

decline.title: Decline this reference request
decline.body: The request will be closed, reminders will stop immediately, and your personal data will be scheduled for erasure.
decline.done: The request is declined. Reminders have stopped and your data is scheduled for erasure. You can close this page.

reasons.NOT_COMFORTABLE: I'm not comfortable providing this reference

report-abuse.title: Report this request as unwanted
report-abuse.body: The request will be closed and reminders will stop immediately. We record abuse reports to protect recipients.
report-abuse.done: Thank you. The request is closed and you will not receive further emails about it.

stop-reminders.title: Stop reminder emails
stop-reminders.body: We'll stop reminding you about this request. The invitation itself stays valid until it expires.
stop-reminders.done: Reminders are stopped. You can still respond any time before the request expires.

consent.crossBorderQuestion: I am located in a different jurisdiction than this service's region
consent.declineHint: Declining closes the request, stops all reminders, and schedules your data for erasure. No answers are collected before you agree.
consent.loadError: Could not load the consent text. Please retry.

respond.title: Reference for {requester}
respond.letterHint: This exact text becomes the locked document after the requester accepts it — review it carefully.
respond.recipientConfirm: I confirm this reference is for {requester}.
respond.relationshipConfirm: I confirm the professional relationship I described is accurate.
respond.requiredHint: Answer the required questions (*) to submit.
respond.expiredBody: For security, response sessions are short. Open the invitation link from your email again and confirm your email — your saved draft will be restored.
respond.declinedBody: You declined this request. Reminders have stopped and your personal data is scheduled for erasure. You can close this page.
respond.submittedBody: Your response is submitted. The requester will review it; the final document is locked only after their acceptance. Thank you!

uploads.title: Attachments (optional)
uploads.hint: Attach a scanned or signed copy. A detached signature must reference the uploaded file it signs — signatures cover your uploaded file, not the generated document.
uploads.targetRequired: Upload the signed file first, then select it as the signature's target.

verify.title: Verified document
verify.versionLine: Version {version}, locked {date}. Locked versions cannot be changed.
verify.superseded: A newer version of this document exists.
verify.invalidTitle: This verification link is invalid or no longer active
verify.invalidBody: The link may have expired, been revoked by the document owner, or never existed. Ask the person who shared it for a new link.
verify.removedBody: The document was removed at the data subject's request. No verification details are available.
verify.retractedBanner: Recommendation retracted by the recommender on {date}.
verify.dataRequestsPrompt: Are you the recommender and want to exercise your data rights?

errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.CONSENT_REQUIRED: This step requires your explicit confirmation.
errors.CODE_INVALID: That code is not valid. Check the code and try again.
errors.CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED: Please confirm the required checkboxes before submitting.
errors.CONTACT_IN_USE: This contact is referenced by a reference request and cannot be deleted.
errors.INVALID_REQUEST_STATE: This action is not available in the request's current state.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Some fields are invalid. Please review and try again.
errors.NOT_FOUND: Not found. It may have been removed or the link may have expired.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have access to this.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session has ended. Please sign in again.
errors.PROFILE_ERROR: Your profile could not be updated.
errors.EXECUTION_NOT_AUTOMATED: This request type has no automated executor yet — it must be handled manually.
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong ({code}). Please try again.

dsr.title: Data & privacy

types.REGION_MIGRATION: Move my data to another region

dsr.recommenderNote: Recommenders who want to withdraw consent for a reference they gave should use the email link they received, not this form.
dsr.empty: You have no data requests yet.

dataRequests.title: Manage your data
dataRequests.intro: If you gave a professional reference through Verifolio, you can exercise your data rights here. Enter the email address the request was sent to.
dataRequests.sentBody: If we have data associated with this email, we've sent a verification code to it. Follow the link in that email to continue.
dataRequests.verifyIntro: Enter the code from the email and choose what you'd like to do.
dataRequests.typeLabel: What would you like to do?

types.REGION_MIGRATION: Move my data to another region

dataRequests.doneWithdrawal: Consent withdrawal completed. The recommendation has been retracted and your personal data in this recommendation erased.
dataRequests.doneRecordedNoDate: Your request has been recorded. We will respond within the statutory period.

login.title: Admin sign-in
login.subtitle: Enter your admin email to receive a single-use sign-in link.
login.sent: If this is an admin address, a sign-in link is on its way. The link is valid for 15 minutes.

callback.invalidTitle: This admin sign-in link is invalid or has expired
callback.invalidBody: Admin links are single-use and expire after 15 minutes. Request a new one to continue.

mfa.codeFormat: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
mfa.enrollBody: Scan this QR code with an authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code it shows.
mfa.challengeBody: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.
mfa.expiredBody: The setup window has expired. Request a new sign-in link to continue.

dashboard.pendingHint: Data subject requests awaiting review or execution in your region.

queue.title: Data request review queue
queue.empty: No data requests match this filter.
queue.selectHint: Select a request to see its details.
queue.subject: Subject
queue.rejectBody: Add optional notes explaining why this request is being rejected. The notes are recorded on the request.

execNotAutomated.title: Manual execution required
execNotAutomated.body: Automated execution for this request type is not available yet. Complete this request through the manual process.
